original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Mia, Victoria, Amelia, and Daniel. "Mia is a knight if and only if Victoria is a knave," Mia claimed. "If Daniel is a knave then Amelia is a knave," Victoria mentioned. Amelia asserted: "If Mia is a knight then Victoria is a knight". "Daniel is a knight and Victoria is a knave," Daniel claimed. So who is a knight and who is a knave?
